detail:
Tiny11 lab gate blocked by invalid_provenance: canonical Tiny11 interop store at /home/jf/research/ned/labs/windows/kvm-win11/vm failed provenance validation: interop manifest dir /home/jf/research/ned/labs/windows/kvm-win11/vm does not contain any .json manifests
remediation: populate the canonical Tiny11 interop store with `honeypot-control-plane consume-image --config <control-plane.toml> --source-manifest <bundle-manifest.json>`
